message:
refactor(cli/search): improve error handling and add combined search scope

## Network Error Detection

- Add isNetworkError() helper that identifies network-related errors by
  checking for common patterns: fetch failures, connection refused, timeouts,
  DNS errors (ENOTFOUND), and status code 0 (no response).

- Use this for smarter offline fallback: only fall back to offline library
  when the error is actually network-related, not for auth or API errors.

## Refactored searchPersonal()

- Extract fetchResults() helper function that handles a single API endpoint
  call with consistent error handling, auth detection, and offline fallback.

- Add resolveSource() helper to normalize the source field from API responses,
  ensuring we always have a valid "mine" | "saved" | "collection" value.

## Combined Search (scopes.all)

- Implement proper combined search when both scopes.mine and scopes.saved
  are true, or when scopes.all is set.

- Uses Promise.all() to query /cli/search/mine and /cli/search/saved in
  parallel for better performance.

- Merges results from both endpoints, preserving error and offline state
  from either response.

## Smarter Offline Fallback

- Only attempt offline fallback for saved/all scopes (where offline data
  exists), not for mine-only searches which require fresh API data.

- Check for network errors specifically before falling back, rather than
  any exception.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
